data.title: Moore launches Moore MOBILEpurpose, a texting platform using A2P & P2P messaging, powered by SimioCloud for fundraising.
data.description: A prominent CXM company, Moore, has introduced Moore MOBILEpurpose, employing A2P and P2P messaging for customized engagement through omnichannel data integration using SimioCloud. The launch was disclosed on September 4, 2025 in Washington.

data.title: Former GOP congressman Billy Long ousted as IRS head by Trump just 2 months post confirmation. Treasury Sec Scott Bessent steps in as interim commissioner.
data.description: Former Republican congressman Billy Long is stepping down as the head of the tax agency. He will be replaced by acting commissioner Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent.

data.title: Rare futures trading pattern, "double gaps," seen in Bitcoin 4 times in history (June 2019, Dec 2020, May-June 2022, July 2025), precedes powerful moves - Delphi Digital.
data.description: A potential indicator for Bitcoin's next move is a rare futures trading pattern known as "CME double gaps," where futures markets reopen twice in the same direction, creating consecutive chart gaps. This pattern has only occurred four times in Bitcoin's history: June 2019, December 2020, May–June 2022, and most recently July 2025. Marcus, a markets researcher at Delphi Digital, highlights the significance of this pattern, stating that when double gaps appear, the expectation is that the second gap will close quickly. The recent observation of this pattern has sparked speculation about Bitcoin's potential trajectory. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Copper-to-gold ratio at 0.0015, lowest since March 2020, sparking global growth fears amid economic uncertainty.
data.description: The copper-to-gold ratio, a key indicator of global economic sentiment, has fallen to 0.0015, the lowest level seen since the depths of the 2020 pandemic in March of that year. This sharp decline signifies a loss of confidence in the economic recovery, with investors fearing a global growth slowdown. The ratio tracks how many pounds of copper can be exchanged for one ounce of gold, reflecting the balance between industrial activity (copper) and safe-haven demand (gold) in the market. A drop in this ratio indicates a "risk-off" sentiment as gold outperforms copper, typically signaling economic uncertainty and potential slowdowns. This trend is concerning as it often precedes or coincides with major economic downturns.

data.title: Cameroon's construction industry projected to grow at 4.8% in 2025, with 5.7% AAGR during 2026-2029. Major focus on infrastructure, energy projects.
data.description: A recent report on the construction market in Cameroon reveals that the industry is projected to grow by 4.8% in real terms by 2025, with significant investments in infrastructure, energy, and utilities sectors. The report covers market analysis for commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential sectors through 2029. This data was compiled by ResearchAndMarkets.com. The National Institute of Statistics of Cameroon provided the statistical information for this analysis.

data.title: The Knot debuts The Engagement Era Collection with invitations, websites, registry picks for favorite lovers.
data.description: In New York, a popular English teacher and gym teacher are getting married, and The Knot is marking the occasion. The leading wedding planning tech platform introduces The Engagement Era Collection today. It includes invitations, wedding websites, and registry selections inspired by the couple. The curated collection aims to provide couples with ideas as they plan their weddings. The offerings are influenced by the Fairytale and New Romantics theme.

data.title: Hirsch introduces Velocity 3.9 for security management, emphasizing trust and operational efficiency.
data.description: Santa Ana, California - Hirsch, a renowned company in high-security access control, video surveillance, perimeter protection, and identity verification solutions, has introduced Velocity 3.9, its newest innovation in the award-winning security management platform. This latest advancement is specifically designed for organizations prioritizing trust, compliance, and operational effectiveness. Velocity 3.9 aids leaders in protecting individuals, assets, and information while streamlining large-scale operations. Developed to deliver business impact, executives are presented with a comprehensive solution.

data.title: PAR Technology Corporation (NYSE: PAR) CEO to present at Goldman Sachs conference in SF on Sep. 17 at 4:45 PM ET.
data.description: In New Hartford, N.Y., PAR Technology Corporation (NYSE: PAR), a global foodservice technology company, revealed that its CEO, Savneet Singh, will address institutional investors at the Goldman Sachs Communacopia + Technology Conference at The Palace Hotel in San Francisco, California. The presentation is scheduled for 4:45 PM Eastern Time on Wednesday, September __. PAR is known for offering unified commerce solutions to enterprise restaurants and foodservice outlets worldwide.

data.title: Sypris Electronics wins contract to manufacture power supply modules for classified missile program, production starts 2026.
data.description: Sypris Electronics, LLC, a subsidiary of Sypris Solutions, Inc., publicly traded on Nasdaq under the symbol SYPR, shared their recent contract news. The company has been selected for a follow-on contract to produce and test electronic power supply modules for a confidential missile program. The modules will be integrated into the avionics suite of the mission-critical project. The production for this contract is set to commence in 2026. While specific details of the agreement were not revealed, this achievement emphasizes the company's expanding role and dedication to cutting-edge technology.

data.title: Justin Sun's WLFI wallet banned post $9M transfer; concerns arise over trading constraints due to price drop.
data.description: After transferring $9 million worth of WLFI tokens on Thursday, Justin Sun's token address was subsequently blacklisted. This incident has sparked worries about potential trading limitations as the prices of the tokens continue to decline.

data.title: Ciena's fiscal Q3 earnings and revenue beat estimates, stock rose; guided above expectations amid high data center demand.
data.description: Ciena's stock saw a significant increase following the release of its fiscal Q3 earnings and revenue report, which surpassed consensus estimates. The company reported strong numbers, with revenue exceeding expectations due to robust data center demand. Additionally, Ciena's guidance for the upcoming period exceeded forecasts, further contributing to the positive investor sentiment.

data.title: Global Medical Device Security Market estimated at USD 8.32 Bn in 2025, expected to reach USD 15.02 Bn by 2032, with 8.8% CAGR growth. North America leads market capturing 37.3% in 2025. Rise in healthcare cyber-attacks driving market growth, with 307 data breaches in first half of 2025. Implementation costs limiting market growth.
data.description: The Global Medical Device Security Market is currently valued at USD 8.32 billion in 2025 and is projected to reach USD 15.02 billion by 2032, with an expected compound annual growth rate of 8.8%. Key market trends include the increased adoption of IoT-enabled medical devices, leading to heightened security risks and the necessity for advanced cybersecurity solutions. The solutions segment is expected to hold 55.2% market share by 2025, with wearables holding 34.5% share. North America leads the market with a 37.3% share in 2025, while Asia Pacific is projected to have a share of 23.4%. The rise in healthcare cyberattacks is a major driver for market growth, with incidents escalating globally. However, high implementation costs could hinder market growth, especially in underserved regions.

data.title: Highland Copper reports increased copper recoveries to 87.6% and reduced processing costs at Copperwood project in Michigan.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on September 4, 2025, Highland Copper Company Inc. revealed promising outcomes from its metallurgical test work program for the Copperwood Project in Michigan's Upper Peninsula. The project, wholly owned by Highland, saw the tests conducted by Base Metallurgical Laboratories Ltd. in Kamloops, British Columbia, under the supervision of DRA Americas Inc. The company's stocks trade on TSXV as HI and on OTCQB as HDRSF.

data.title: Research report on in-vehicle payments for passenger vehicles in North America and Europe 2024-2031 using disruptive technologies like IoT, AI, 5G.
data.description: A report titled "In-vehicle Payments for the Passenger Vehicles Market, North America and Europe, 2024-2031" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report provides insights from discussions with major original equipment manufacturers (OEMs), Tier I suppliers, fintech innovators, technology providers, and regulators. It presents a thorough examination of market trends and expansion prospects. The report includes extensive forecasts regarding revenue possibilities, technology uptake, and market dynamics for the mentioned regions.

data.title: KBRA rates NYCTL 2025-A Trust with $172.5M property tax ABS; 3,915 NY property tax liens with $220M value, 9.5% rate.
data.description: In New York, KBRA has assigned a preliminary rating to a single class of notes from NYCTL 2025-A Trust, a $172.5 million asset-backed securities (ABS) transaction tied to property tax liens. The funds raised from the Notes will go towards obtaining a total of 3,915 property tax liens in New York City, with a combined redemptive value of around $220.0 million and an average interest rate of 9.5%. The majority of the $220.0 million principal balance is attributed to residential properties (74.0%), with commercial and industrial properties making up the rest.

data.title: Interview discusses potential impact of AI military upgrade on US security and economy.
data.description: An interview recently showcased the potential impact of advanced weapons on America's security and economy. Experts discussed how cutting-edge weapons technology could revolutionize the nation's defense capabilities while also driving economic growth. The interview highlighted that investment in advanced weapons systems could potentially create thousands of jobs and contribute significantly to the economy. The experts emphasized that this shift towards advanced weaponry is crucial for maintaining America's global competitive edge.

data.title: BioFlyte receives U.S. Air Force SBIR Phase II contract to advance BioTOF system for chem/bio aerosol detection.
data.description: In Albuquerque, New Mexico, BioFlyte has secured a Phase II Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) contract from the U.S. Air Force. The contract centers on enhancing the durability of the BioTOF technology.

data.title: WIF price remains stable at $0.81 amid market fluctuations. Dogwifhat trades at $0.81 with positive MACD signals.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Dogwifhat is currently trading at $0.81, showing bullish signals on the MACD indicator as it tests important support levels during a period of sideways movement.
